prompt: Add a floating, holographic 3D equalizer above the tracks, pulsating in sync with the audio waves.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Add a floating, translucent, glowing blue holographic 3D equalizer, positioned centrally within the main grid area above the audio waveform tracks. Its bars should visibly pulsate, mimicking real-time synchronization with the displayed audio waves.
objects: Floating, translucent, glowing blue holographic 3D equalizer (positioned centrally within the main grid area above the audio waveform tracks, with visibly pulsating bars mimicking real-time synchronization with audio waves)
Audio waveform tracks (purple and green segments)
Track control panels (sliders, buttons, and track names)
Top status/menu bar (with time, service, battery)
Track icons (e.g., microphone, drum kit, guitar, person)
